message.content:
Search the entire codebase for all references to the amber-gold "active glow" color system that was recently added. I need to find every CSS file and every reference that uses:
- `--color-active-glow` (any variant: subtle, border, etc.)
- `rgba(212, 169, 76` (the raw amber-gold color)
- `#D4A94C` (the hex amber-gold)
- `warmPulse` keyframes

Also search for all uses of `--font-heading` to see where Plus Jakarta Sans is applied.

Report back every file path and line where these appear, so I know the full scope of what needs to change. Be thorough - check all .css and .jsx files.

content.text: I'll conduct a comprehensive search of the codebase for all references to the amber-gold active glow color system and the font-heading variable. Let me search systematically across all CSS and JSX files.

content.text: Perfect! Let me get more details from the warmPulse keyframes and check the complete definitions:
Now let me check the other CSS module files for complete coverage:

Perfect! I now have a complete inventory of all the color system and font references. Let me compile the comprehensive report:

## Complete Scope Report: Amber-Gold Active Glow Color System & Plus Jakarta Sans Font

I've conducted a thorough search of your entire codebase. Here's the complete inventory of where the amber-gold active glow color system and Plus Jakarta Sans font are applied:

### CSS Variable Definitions
**File: `C:\Users\johnm\modular apartment planner\src\styles\variables.css`**
- Line 37: `--color-active-glow: #D4A94C;`
- Line 38: `--color-active-glow-subtle: rgba(212, 169, 76, 0.12);`
- Line 39: `--color-active-glow-border: rgba(212, 169, 76, 0.30);`
- Line 48: `--font-heading: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;`
- Line 73: `--shadow-active-glow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(212, 169, 76, 0.20), 0 0 8px rgba(212, 169, 76, 0.10);`

### Keyframes Definition
**File: `C:\Users\johnm\modular apartment planner\src\styles\global.css`**
- Lines 90-97: `@keyframes warmPulse` with rgba(212, 169, 76, ...) at lines 92 and 95

### Toolbar Active Glow References
**File: `C:\Users\johnm\modular apartment planner\src\ui\Toolbar.module.css`**
- Line 117: `background: var(--color-active-glow);`
- Line 118: `box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(212, 169, 76, 0.40);`
- Line 119: `animation: warmPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;`
- Lines 122-131: Duplicate `@keyframes warmPulse` definition (with opacity added)
  - Line 124: `box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(212, 169, 76, 0.40);`
  - Line 128: `box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(212, 169, 76, 0.60);`
- Line 175: `font-family: var(--font-heading);`

---

## Summary

**Total files affected: 9 CSS files**

**Variant patterns found:**
- `--color-active-glow` (main color): 13 references
- `--color-active-glow-subtle` (12% opacity): 10 references
- `--color-active-glow-border` (30% opacity): 5 references
- `--shadow-active-glow` (shadow composite): 1 reference (in variables.css) + used implicitly in CSS
- `rgba(212, 169, 76, ...)` (raw RGBA): 11 direct references (various opacity levels: 0.12, 0.18, 0.30, 0.40, 0.60, 0.20, 0.10)
- `#D4A94C` (hex): 1 direct reference
- `warmPulse` keyframes: 2 definitions + 1 animation reference (3 total)
- `--font-heading`: 1 variable definition + 9 CSS usages (10 total)

**Note:** The `warmPulse` keyframe is defined twice—once in `global.css` (lines 90-97) and again in `Toolbar.module.css` (lines 122-131). The second definition in Toolbar is the one actually used by the save button animation.
